cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC +2.48% · Gold +1.78% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 31% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at -0.10%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.10%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -6.28%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -12.72%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +11.48%, ISRG +5.87%, AAPL +4.74%, HON +4.29%, ADBE +4.10%. Laggards: TER -12.72%, CEVA -11.18%, PUBM -10.77%, KLAC -10.74%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.20% at $161.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.20% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
